description.value:
Requirements You used your last action this turn to [[/act grapple]] a creature within your reach.

You bring additional limbs to bear, ensuring that you either ensnare your target or wrap your captured prey in additional tentacles. Attempt to Grapple the target, but the attempt's multiple attack penalty is only –3 if it's your second attack on your turn or –6 if it's the third or subsequent attack. If the target is already @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Restrained] by you, replace Grapple's effects with the following.

Critical Success If your target was grabbed, it's now restrained until the end of your next turn unless you move or your target Escapes. Until the end of your next turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Athletics DC to resist the target's attempts to Escape.

Success You wrap additional limbs around the target. Until the end of your next turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Athletics DC to resist the target's attempts to Escape, and you increase the flat check DC it must attempt when attempting a manipulate action to 7.

Failure You fail to wrap additional limbs around your target, but it remains grabbed or restrained.
